description: Coverage targets for WordPress Core fuzzing across API, database, admin, runtime registration, content, media, users, and performance surfaces.

fixture_shapes.content: posts, pages, attachments, comments, menus, taxonomies, revisions, and rewrite rules
fixture_shapes.users: administrator, editor, author, contributor, subscriber, and REST permission-boundary roles
fixture_shapes.admin: Core wp-admin menu and submenu targets with destructive or installer actions classified as skipped
fixture_shapes.runtime_state: registered hooks, cron events, options, transients, postmeta, taxonomies, post types, and rewrite state
fixture_shapes.api: Core REST route inventory and safe request-case declarations

side_effect_policies.read: route, admin, frontend, database, hook, cron, option, media, and user inventories are product declarations until proof artifacts exist
side_effect_policies.create_update: content, media, user, option, and rewrite mutations are blocked without upstream rollback-safe fixture primitives
side_effect_policies.delete: destructive fixture paths are blocked without upstream deletion rollback artifacts
side_effect_policies.external_http: Core external HTTP observations are classification-only in this manifest

rest.coverage_goal: registered Core REST routes, generated safe request cases, and role permission-boundary rows

admin.coverage_goal: safe Core wp-admin page enumeration with role boundaries, skipped reasons, and query attribution

frontend.coverage_goal: front page, singular, archive, search, feed, attachment, and request/rendering coverage

database.coverage_goal: Core schema inventory, query profiles, options, postmeta, rewrite, and runtime-state attribution coverage

compare.rest: registered Core REST routes minus generated safe request cases and role permission-boundary rows
compare.admin: manifest admin pages minus captured readiness and query attribution artifacts
compare.frontend: front page, singular, archive, search, feed, attachment, and request coverage artifacts minus captured rendering rows
compare.database: Core schema inventory and query profiles minus options, postmeta, rewrite, hook, cron, and transient attribution rows

executable: expected artifact semantic keys are declared
proven: permission and query-attribution summaries are present
gap report records uncovered routes and surfaces
